basics.description: Deploy a complete, network-isolated **Oracle to Azure Database for PostgreSQL schema-conversion lab**: a Windows workstation (Visual Studio Code + the Microsoft PostgreSQL extension), an Oracle source database, an Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible server, and an Azure OpenAI (Microsoft Foundry) deployment for AI-assisted conversion. All resources sit inside a single virtual network and are reached privately over Azure Bastion. [Learn more](https://github.com/Balunywa/azure-oracle-pg-migrator).

basics.name: adminUsername
basics.label: Administrator username
basics.toolTip: The local administrator account for the workstation VM (also used as the RDP login and as the Oracle and PostgreSQL admin login).

basics.name: adminPassword
basics.toolTip: Login password. Reused for the workstation RDP login and the Oracle and PostgreSQL admin accounts. 12-123 characters, and must include at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and one digit.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 12-123 characters with at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and one digit.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: Workstation VM size
elements.toolTip: Size of the Windows workstation VM. D4s_v3 is enough for Visual Studio Code and is broadly available. Pick a family you have vCPU quota for in this region; if the Dsv5 sizes fail preflight with a quota error, choose a Dsv3 or Dasv5 size instead.

options.text: A Linux VM runs Oracle Database Free (23ai) in a container and is seeded with a sample HR schema on first boot. It is reachable privately on TCP 1521 inside the virtual network. Service name: FREEPDB1.

elements.name: oracleVmSize
elements.label: Oracle VM size
elements.toolTip: Size of the Linux VM that hosts the Oracle source database container.

options.text: An Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible server is deployed with private access into a delegated subnet, reachable only from within the virtual network.

elements.name: postgresSkuTier
elements.label: PostgreSQL compute tier
elements.toolTip: Compute tier for the flexible server. Burstable is the most economical choice for a lab.

options.text: An Azure OpenAI (Microsoft Foundry) account and model deployment are created for AI-assisted schema conversion. The workstation's managed identity is granted the Cognitive Services OpenAI User role, and the endpoint and deployment name are wired into the workstation automatically.

elements.name: openAiDeploymentName
elements.label: Model deployment name
elements.toolTip: Name of the Azure OpenAI model deployment used for the conversion. The default deploys the gpt-5-mini model.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 2-64 characters: letters, numbers, dot, dash or underscore.
